author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Customize Your Star Atlas Notifications

Hey everyone, if you like to stay up-to-date on Star Atlas, read on and make sure you understand how we'll be communicating in Discord going forward. 

Instead of (@)everyone and (@)here pinging people with every update and change we make, we're moving to something more customizable for everyone's specific interests. There's now @All Pings , @Game Pings , @Event Pings and @Sneak Peek Pings that you can now go grab in ⁠🔔┃choose-pings.

This allows us to ping more without worrying about others muting our server and you guys can tailor the notifications to match your interests. Win/win!  

 | ⁠🔔┃choose-pings
